title: Monday Forms - Address Field
excerpt:

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
The “Location” question on Forms is extremely picky when accepting an address.
We have about 10 field sales staff who all have experienced typing in an address that would be accepted on their iPhones for directions, but not accepted in Monday.
Looking to get some traction on enhancing this field to be more flexible and accepting? Something similar to how Google or Apple Maps would interact with would be ideal.
